name: Sweet IQ (Powered By Uberall)
description:
What SweetIQ Does?

Sweet IQ (powered by Uberall) is a comprehensive suite providing services like Local Listings Management to Ads and beyond.  By providing tools for local listings management, SEO analytics, review management, local advertising, and competitor analysis, SweetIQ equips businesses with everything they need to succeed in the competitive landscape of local search.

‍

Source: SweetIQ

Features:

➡️ SweetIQ, powered by Uberall, facilitates the management of local business listings across various online directories, ensuring consistency and accuracy.

➡️ Gain insights into local search performance with advanced analytics tools, allowing businesses to track key metrics and optimize their strategies.

➡️ Monitor and respond to customer reviews from multiple platforms within a centralized dashboard, helping businesses maintain their online reputation.

➡️ Launch targeted local advertising campaigns across different channels, reaching potential customers in specific geographic areas.

➡️ Analyze competitors' local search strategies and performance metrics to identify opportunities and stay ahead in the market.

Benefits:

⭐️ With SweetIQ, powered by Uberall, businesses can enhance their visibility in local search results, attracting more customers to their physical locations.

⭐️ Efficient review management tools enable businesses to monitor and respond to customer feedback promptly, fostering trust and loyalty among their audience.

⭐️ By optimizing local advertising campaigns and leveraging competitor insights, businesses can drive more foot traffic to their stores and increase sales.

⭐️ SweetIQ's analytics provide valuable data and insights that empower businesses to make informed decisions and optimize their local marketing strategies for better results.

⭐️ With centralized management tools for listings, reviews, and advertising, SweetIQ, powered by Uberall, helps businesses save time and resources by streamlining their local marketing efforts into one platform.

Pros: 

✅ Great interface and very easy to use 

✅ Easy to navigate dashboard 

✅ Provides everything under one roof

Cons:

❌ Available only for USA and Canada 

❌ One cannot reply to reviews from the platform 

❌ No integration with Yelp with a few plans 

‍

Offers Custom Pricing Options For Different Services
what_people_say:
Likes:

‍

“The most helpful thing about SweetIQ is their dashboards. I find it convenient to have your important marketing parameters performance in one place which helps to understand the situation and plan.”

‍

Dislikes:

‍

“SweetIQ was very user-friendly, but I wish that it had more data on competitors' performance and the ability to respond to reviews on Google, Facebook, etc. all from the platform.”

‍

*Review sourced and cited through G2*
